## Category

## Product Brief
1. LogicGate is an AI-powered enterprise GRC platform.
2. It helps governance, risk, and compliance teams limit surprises, strengthen resilience, and confidently quantify impact and business value through a centralized view with AI intelligence.
3. The platform differentiates with intentional AI and agentic AI offerings designed to eliminate repetitive tasks, streamline data review, and accelerate time to insight.

---

## RSA 2026 Highlights
- LogicGate announced a significant expansion of its Spark AI features with Spark AI Reporting Insights and Spark AI Automated Evidence Testing, aimed at replacing tedious tasks with machine-speed automation.
- The company was recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Third-Party Risk Management Platforms, Q1 2026 Report, earning high scores in AI Governance, Usability, and Strategy.

---

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] How do the new Spark AI features specifically enhance real-time risk insights for large enterprises?
- [ ] Can you provide a demonstration of the AI-powered automated evidence testing and its impact on compliance workflows?
- [ ] What are LogicGate's key strategies for integrating AI governance into existing GRC frameworks at RSA Conference 2026?
